StructurePhase.Reference: Subbotin I.M., Raevskaya M.V., Loboda T.P., Sokolovskaya E.M., Moscow Univ. Chem. Bull. (Engl. Transl.), v36 p51 (1981)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 531800. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Mo,Ru. Compound Preparation: melted. Sample annealed at 1273 K. Article Title: THE REACTION OF MOLYBDENUM AND RUTHENIUM WITH TRANSITION METALS OF PERIOD VI. Wyckoff Sequence: j i2 g a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Svechnikov V.N., Kobzenko G.F., Dokl. Akad. Nauk SSSR, v155 p611 (1964)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 453847. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Mo. Article Title: The chromium-molybdenum diagram. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
